title: Beco Dog Poo Bags - Strong, Leakproof & Large - 100% Recycled Plastic, Extra Thick Dog Poop Bags, Heavy Duty - Mint Scented Refill Rolls, 540 Count
features: EASY TO OPEN - These dog poop bags have clear perforations to tear off the roll and are easy to open. They pair perfectly with your dispenser or are small enough to pop in your pocket for whenever you need them.
BIG, STRONG & LEAKPROOF - These poop bags are extra thick & tear-resistant to protect your hands from any messy moments. Strong seams make them 100% leakproof (we promise).
BETTER BAGS: 100% of the plastic in the bags is post-consumer recycled, giving waste plastic another (more stinky) life.
CLEANING UP HOW WE CLEAN UP AFTER OUR PETS - We are a B Corp company that is taking certified climate action while supporting litter-free green spaces.
IN THIS PACK - 540 mint scented Beco dog poo bags measuring 33 x 22cm, on 36 refill rolls (each roll contains 15 bags).
description: From the manufacturer Big, Strong & Leakproof Big and strong enough to rely on. With each bag coming in at 22 x 33cm they are extra long and thick (15 microns to be exact) to protect your hands. Easy-Tear Each bag has perforated edges for easy separation and opening whilst out and about. Recycled Materials Our bags are made from 100% recycled PET (post consumer waste). Each roll is on a recycled cardboard core and the cardboard packaging is made from recycled paper. Dispenser Compatible All of our bags on a roll are compatible with standard dispensers.
